question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: Which hero was the fastest? which hero refers to superhero_name; fastest refers to MAX(attribute_value) WHERE attribute_name = 'Speed';
orig_masked: Which [T9] was the [C10]? which [T9] refers to [C28]; [C10] refers to MAX([C10]) WHERE [C3] = '[V1]';; [V1] is a value of the column [C3]
orig_evidence: which hero refers to superhero_name; fastest refers to MAX(attribute_value) WHERE attribute_name = 'Speed';
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T1.superhero_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_attribute AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN attribute AS T3 ON T2.attribute_id = T3.id WHERE T3.attribute_name = 'Speed' ORDER BY T2.attribute_value DESC LIMIT 1

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: What is the long passing score of the oldest player? long passing score refers to long_passing; oldest player refers to oldest birthday;
orig_masked: What is the [C150] of the [C121] [T4]? [C150] refers to [C150]; [C121] [T4] refers to [C121] [C121];
orig_evidence: long passing score refers to long_passing; oldest player refers to oldest birthday;
orig_gold_sql: SELECT t2.long_passing FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id ORDER BY t1.birthday ASC LIMIT 1

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: Which foot is preferred by Abdou Diallo? Abdou Diallo refers to player_name = 'Abdou Diallo'; foot is preferred refers to preferred_foot
orig_masked: Which [C159] is [C159] by [V1]? [V1] refers to [C126] = '[V1]'; [C159] is [C159] refers to [C159]; [V1] is a value of the column [C126]
orig_evidence: Abdou Diallo refers to player_name = 'Abdou Diallo'; foot is preferred refers to preferred_foot
orig_gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t2.preferred_foot FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: Please provide a list of clients who were born between 1983 and 1987 and whose account branch is in East Bohemia, along with their IDs.
orig_masked: Please provide a list of [T3] who were [C9] between [V2] and [V3] and whose [T1] [C25] is in [V1], along with their [C10]. ; [V1] is a value of the column [C25]; [V2] is a value of the column [C9]; [V3] is a value of the column [C9]
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T1.client_id, T3.account_id FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id INNER JOIN disp AS T4 ON T1.client_id = T4.client_id INNER JOIN account AS T3 ON T2.district_id = T3.district_id and T4.account_id = T3.account_id WHERE T2.A3 = 'east Bohemia' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T1.birth_date) BETWEEN '1983' AND '1987'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: How many patients with a normal RF don't have thrombosis? normal RF refers to RF < 20; don't have thrombosis refers to Thrombosis = '0';
orig_masked: How many [T1] with a [C42] [C42] don't have [C13]? [C42] [C42] refers to [C42] < [V1]; don't have [C13] refers to [C13] = '[V2]';; [V1] is a value of the column [C42]; [V2] is a value of the column [C13]
orig_evidence: normal RF refers to RF < 20; don't have thrombosis refers to Thrombosis = '0';
orig_gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Examination AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.RF < 20 AND T1.Thrombosis = 0

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: In the 2015–2016 season, how many games were played in the Italian Serie A league? In the 2015–2016 season refers to season = '2015/2016'
orig_masked: In the [V3] [C108], how many [T3] were [T3] in the [V1] [T2]? In the [V3] [C108] refers to [C108] = '[V2]'; [V1] is a value of the column [C5]; [V2] is a value of the column [C108]; [V3] is a value of the column [C108]
orig_evidence: In the 2015–2016 season refers to season = '2015/2016'
orig_gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(t2.id) FROM League AS t1 INNER JOIN Match AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.league_id WHERE t1.name = 'Italy Serie A' AND t2.season = '2015/2016'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: How many superheroes with blonde hair are there?  superheroes with blonde hair refers to colour = 'Blond' where hair_colour_id = colour.id
orig_masked: How many [T9] with [V1] [C22] are there?  [T9] with [V1] [C22] refers to [C5] = '[V2]' where [C22] = [C6]; [V1] is a value of the column [C5]; [V2] is a value of the column [C5]
orig_evidence: superheroes with blonde hair refers to colour = 'Blond' where hair_colour_id = colour.id
orig_gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN colour AS T2 ON T1.hair_colour_id = T2.id WHERE T2.colour = 'Blond'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: Calculate the percentage of account from 'Decin' district for all accounts are opened in 1993. A2 contains the information about district.
orig_masked: Calculate the percentage of [T1] from '[V1]' [T5] for all [T1] are [T1] in [V2]. [C24] contains the information about [T5].; [V1] is a value of the column [C24]; [V2] is a value of the column [C2]
orig_evidence: A2 contains the information about district.
orig_gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(T1.A2 = 'Decin') AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(account_id) FROM district AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T2.date) = '1993'

question: <QUESTION>

orig_evidence: total protein is lower than normal refers to TP < 6.0;
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T1.Diagnosis FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.TP < 6.0

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: How many female clients' accounts are in the region of South Bohemia? Female refers to gender = 'F'; A3 contains the region 'south Bohemia'
orig_masked: How many [C12] [T3]' [T1] are in the [C25] of [V1]? [C12] refers to [C12] = '[V2]'; [C25] contains the [C25] '[V1]'; [V1] is a value of the column [C25]; [V2] is a value of the column [C12]
orig_evidence: Female refers to gender = 'F'; A3 contains the region 'south Bohemia'
